analysis.empty.hint: Apply a template to generate chart data.
analysis.empty.title: No analysis data
apply_to_new_files_requires_same_config: Template changed. Please Apply to All again.
auto_template_hint: Infer columns and grouping per file
auto_template_summary_failed: Auto extraction could not infer this preview yet.
auto_template_summary_auto_grouping: Auto grouping from Point/VAR2 or repeated X shape
curveTaggingFileNameBothRequired: When using file-name tagging, please provide keywords for both Vg and Vd.
curveTaggingModeExclusive: Curve tagging must use either Var1/Var2 or file-name keywords, not both.
extractImportCsvFirst: Please import at least one file first.
extractPointsCellPositiveInt: Points cell {cell} must contain a positive integer.
extractPointsCellTooLarge: Points from {cell} ({points}) cannot be larger than the X range length ({total}).
extractCurveTypeUndeterminedFromVarHints: Unable to determine curve type from Var1/Var2 or nearby headers. Please check the template, or use file-name keywords.
extractPreviewLoading: Preview is still loading. Please wait a moment and try again.
extractSelectYColumn: Please select at least one Y column (click column headers in the preview).
extractSetXEndOrUseEnd: Please set X Data end cell (e.g. A1408) or use 'End' to read until the last preview row.
extractSetXStart: Please set X Data start cell (e.g. A2).
extractXNotDivisibleByPoints: X range has {total} points, which is not divisible by points={points}.
extractXNotDivisibleByPointsFromCell: X range has {total} points, which is not divisible by points={points} (from {cell}).
extractXNotDivisibleBySegments: X range has {total} points, which is not divisible by segments={segments}.
extractXSegmentsPositiveInt: Segments must be a positive integer.
extractXPointsPositiveIntOrCell: X Points must be a positive integer (or a cell like B2).
extractXPointsTooLarge: X Points ({points}) cannot be larger than the X range length ({total}).
extractXSameColumn: X Data start/end must be in the same column.
extractYCannotIncludeX: Y columns cannot include the X column.
extractYCountCellPositiveInt: Y Data Count cell {cell} must contain a positive integer.
extractYCountPositiveIntOrCell: Y Data Count must be a positive integer (or a cell like B2).
extractYStartEndValidCells: Y Data start/end must be valid cells (e.g. B2 and D2).
extractYStepCellPositiveNumber: Y Data Step cell {cell} must contain a positive number.
extractYStepPositiveNumberOrCell: Y Data Step must be a positive number (or a cell like B2).
extract_started: Extracting {count} file(s) ({detail}{groups}) to display charts. Will auto-switch to Analysis & Visualization when done.{warnings}
extract_started_incremental: Extracting {count} new file(s) ({detail}{groups}) to display charts. Will auto-switch to Analysis & Visualization when done.{warnings}
preview_empty_hint: A table preview will appear here after importing files.
low_confidence_reason_shape_generic_chan: This file format only provides generic CH1/CH2 sweep columns, so the gate/drain role cannot be identified reliably without a template.
low_confidence_reason_no_reliable_metada: No reliable transfer/output metadata was found.
low_confidence_reason_metadata_conflict: Metadata signals disagree on whether VAR1/X belongs to Vg or Vd.
origin_export_mode_mixed_y_scale_split_h: The current export list mixes Linear and Log Y scales. Origin cannot use both axis types in the same graph layer, so this New columns export will be split into multiple worksheets before plotting.
origin_canvas_scope_summary_current: The current thumbnail will export as a single result unit.
origin_export_mode_merged_hint: Collect selected curves into the same Origin worksheet and write them as newly added columns.
origin_export_mode_workbook_books_hint: Import selected thumbnails into the same Origin window and create a new workbook for each thumbnail.
origin_export_mode_workbook_sheets_hint: Import selected thumbnails into one Origin workbook and create a new worksheet for each thumbnail.
origin_export_mode_separate_hint: Create a new Origin window for each thumbnail in the export scope.
origin_collection_empty: No curves collected yet. Switch files and tick curves in the legend to summarize them into one worksheet.
origin_collection_remove_file: Remove collected curves from this file
origin_collection_current_file_summary: {count}/{total} curves collected in the current file
origin_collection_match_filtered: Collect same legend into same-type filtered files
origin_collection_match_filtered_hint: Use the current curve "{label}" to collect matching legend curves only into filtered files of the same type
origin_collection_match_filtered_pick_cu: Please pick a current curve first.
origin_collection_match_filtered_no_matc: No same-legend curves matching "{label}" were found in filtered files of the same type.
origin_collection_match_filtered_already: All same-legend curves matching "{label}" in same-type filtered files are already in the export basket.
origin_collection_match_filtered_success: Collected {curves} same-legend curve(s) for "{label}" across {files} same-type filtered file(s).
open_in_origin_success: Origin launched and import task submitted.
open_in_origin_combined_success: Origin launched, and {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s) were summarized into one worksheet.
open_in_origin_workbook_books_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s) into different workbooks of the same Origin window.
open_in_origin_workbook_sheets_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s) into different worksheets of the same workbook.
open_in_origin_batch_success: Origin export tasks submitted for {count} thumbnail(s), one standalone Origin window each.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_success: Auto open failed. Exported a ZIP package for manual CSV import in Origin.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_success_with: Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package for manual CSV import in Origin.
Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV data for {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s).
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_workbook_she: Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_batch_succes: Auto open failed. Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
Auto open failed ({reason}). Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
open_in_origin_fallback_zip_failed: Auto open failed, and ZIP fallback export failed: {error}
origin_zip_export_success: Exported a ZIP package with CSV data for {curves} curve(s) from {files} file(s).
origin_zip_export_workbook_sheets_succes: Exported a ZIP package with CSV files for {count} thumbnails.
origin_zip_export_batch_success: Exported a ZIP package with standalone CSV files for {count} thumbnail(s).
origin_select_canvas: Please select at least one thumbnail first.
origin_export_selection_empty: No files selected for export yet.
origin_curve_export_picker_hint: Click the legend labels below to choose which curves to export from this file.
origin_pick_exe_required: Please select Origin executable path first.
origin_error_tip_launch_once: Tip: launch Origin once manually, then retry.
origin_error_tip_register_com: Tip: run Origin once as administrator and register COM server (Origin.exe /regserver), then retry.
origin_error_tip_reselect_exe: Tip: reselect the correct Origin.exe path in Settings.
origin_error_tip_manual_zip: Tip: if auto open fails, export ZIP and import the CSV files manually in Origin.
origin_error_tip_install_python: Tip: install Python with pywin32 and ensure python/py is available in PATH.
origin_error_tip_csv_runner_missing: Tip: CSV runner is missing. Include origin-csv-worker.exe, or temporarily fall back to the Python runner.
origin_error_tip_csv_runner_check: Tip: check origin-csv-worker.exe path/permissions. If the .ob folder is empty, the worker usually did not start; unblock the files or allowlist them in security software.
origin_error_tip_choose_csv_folder: Tip: choose a folder that contains CSV files.
origin_error_tip_close_extra_origin: Tip: close extra Origin processes/windows and keep only one Origin instance before retrying.
match_field_selected_none: Choose suggested fields for this rule
match_phrase_placeholder: Enter a raw filename phrase, for example 1-1-0.1UM
match_phrase_hint: Phrase match searches the original filename text directly and does not split it into fields.
analysis_processing_hint: Extracting and preparing chart data, please wait.
no_processed_data_hint: Apply a template above to generate results.
preview_error_hint: Please try selecting the file again.
preview_auto_columns_locked: Auto mode is using inferred Y columns
preview_resize_column_title: Drag to resize | Double-click to reset
save_curve_tagging_conflict: Var1/Var2 and file-name keywords cannot be used together. Please clear one.
settings_background_desc: Choose the workbench page background color.
settings_storage_desc: Choose where templates and settings are stored.
settings_storage_not_configurable_hint: Path configuration is available in desktop app only.
settings_storage_load_failed: Failed to load user config path: {error}
settings_storage_choose_failed: Failed to update user config path: {error}
settings_storage_save_failed: Failed to save user config path: {error}
settings_storage_reset_default_success: User config path reset to default.
settings_storage_reset_default_failed: Failed to reset user config path: {error}
settings_filename_matching_desc: Choose which separator characters split filename fields for template rules and filename keyword matching.
settings_filename_matching_hint: Each character acts as a separator. The default is {value}.
settings_filename_matching_save_failed: Failed to update filename field separators: {error}
settings_origin_desc: Choose the Origin app used to open files.
settings_origin_not_configurable_hint: Origin path configuration is available in Windows desktop app only.
settings_origin_choose_failed: Failed to update Origin executable path: {error}
settings_origin_batch_desc: Batch process all CSV files (including subfolders) in a selected folder and auto-plot in Origin.
settings_origin_plot_line_width_hint: Line width in pt. Default is 2.
settings_origin_plot_command_hint: Optional full LabTalk command. If set, it overrides plot type and XY pairs.
settings_origin_plot_post_commands_hint: One LabTalk command per line, executed after plotting.
settings_origin_cleanup_desc: Manage automatic cleanup for Origin runtime cache.
chart_axis_x_tooltip_digits_title: Set tooltip X decimal digits (0-20). Leave empty for auto.
chart_axis_show_major_ticks_title: Show major tick marks on the axes
chart_axis_show_minor_ticks_title: Show minor tick marks on the axes
chart_axis_minor_tick_count_title: Set the number of minor ticks between adjacent major ticks (1-20).
chart_axis_tick_label_font_size_title: Set chart tick label font size.
chart_axis_title_font_size_title: Set chart axis title font size.
chart_axis_origin_tick_label_offset_titl: Set Origin tick label offset in percent of font size. Leave empty for Origin default.
chart_axis_origin_title_gap_title: Set Origin axis title gap in percent of major tick length. Leave empty for Origin default.
chart_gm_second_note: Note: this differentiates the focused {label} curve once more along chart x as {axisLabel} (no smoothing). Treat it as a shape diagnostic only; spikes near sparse or noisy regions may be numerical artifacts.
chart_curve_probe_desc: Query any x between measured points and get y by linear interpolation.
chart_diagnostics_disabled: Turn on diagnostics to show the diagnostic curve here.
chart_diagnostics_unavailable: Switch to GM, SS, or VTH to inspect diagnostic curves.
chart_ss_diagnostics_desc: Subthreshold controls and fit configuration for the active curve.
chart_ss_diagnostics_toggle_title: Show or hide the SS diagnostics chart.
chart_gm_diagnostics_desc_enabled: Diagnostics now target the second-order transconductance curve; enter x below to inspect the diagnostic trace directly.
chart_gm_diagnostics_desc_disabled: Derivative-focused guidance for gm interpretation. Turn on diagnostics to inspect the second-order transconductance trace.
chart_j_diagnostics_desc: Current-density controls driven by Area and axis configuration.
chart_vth_diagnostics_toggle_title: Show or hide the Vth slope diagnostics chart.
plot_type_gm_unavailable_hint: Only transfer/output curves support derivative plots.
plot_type_ss_unavailable_hint: SS is available when the selected data has a usable current-vs-bias sweep.
plot_type_vth_unavailable_hint: Vth extraction is available for transfer curves.
plot_type_j_unavailable_hint: Set a positive Area to enable J plot.
chart_fit_line_toggle_title: Toggle fit line overlay (focused curve only).
chart_no_visible_curves: No visible curves. Use the legend checkboxes to show one or more series.
vth_no_stable_fit: No stable sqrt(|Id|)-Vg linear branch was found for the focused curve.
chart_no_series_data: No series data for this file.
calc_group_threshold_voltage_hint: sqrt(|Id|)-Vg linear extrapolation; V-shaped transfer curves are fitted by electron / hole branch.
rc_require_curve_in_file: Select at least one transfer curve in this file for Rc.
rc_require_statistic_selection: Select transfer files and curves in the statistic list first.
rc_error_insufficient_devices: Rc needs at least two valid devices; three or more is recommended.
auto_extract_desc: The system analyzes imported file formats and extracts variables and related parameters automatically. Suitable for standard IV/CV data formats.
template_discard_changes_desc: You have unsaved edits in the Save panel. Discard them and return to Select?
template_export_requires_selection: Please select a template to export.
template_import_conflict:
Template "{name}" already exists.
OK: import as "{newName}".
Cancel: overwrite the existing template.
varPairBothOrNeither: Var1 and Var2 must both be empty or both filled.
varPairCellOrText: Var1 and Var2 must both be cell refs (e.g. A1) or both be text (e.g. Vg). Do not mix.
yColumnsRequired: Please select Y data from the preview header columns.
